title: Dishis Designer Jewellery is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dishis Designer Jewellery is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!
